title: Kandake #2582
definition:
Candace = "prince of servants"

 1) a queen of Ethiopia mentioned in \\#Ac 8:27\\. (A.D. 38) The name was
    not a proper name of an individual, but that of a dynasty of
    Ethiopian queens.
